hero.title: Find Your Dream Car Today
hero.subtitle: Browse our exclusive collection of premium vehicles. Quality, luxury, and performance guaranteed.

about.title: About AutoMotive
about.description1: Welcome to AutoMotive, your premier destination for luxury and performance vehicles. We have been serving our community for over 10 years, providing top-quality cars and exceptional customer service.
about.description2: Our mission is to make the car buying process as smooth and enjoyable as possible. Whether you are looking for a sleek sedan, a powerful SUV, or a sporty coupe, we have something for everyone.

home.why_subtitle: We provide the best service and experience for our customers.
home.premium_desc: All our vehicles undergo rigorous inspection and certification.
home.fast_desc: Quick processing and delivery of your dream car.
home.best_prices_desc: Competitive pricing and transparent deals with no hidden fees.
home.no_cars: No cars available at the moment.
